home.title: PsittaWell
home.description: Offline companion-parrot welfare support with local data kept on this device.
home.databaseUnavailable: The app could not open its local storage. Please restart the app.
home.deleteDraftMessage: Its answers will be removed. This cannot be undone.
home.deleteCompletedMessageNamed: It will be removed from %{name}'s change-over-time history. This cannot be undone.
home.deleteCompletedMessageUnnamed: It will be removed from this parrot's change-over-time history. This cannot be undone.

assessment.consultNote: For any concern, consult an avian vet or a certified parrot behaviour consultant.
assessment.unavailable: This assessment section could not be opened.

overview.title: Assessment
overview.description: Open a section, continue where you left off, or freeze the assessment when you are done.
overview.descriptionCompleted: This assessment is complete. You can review any section, but its answers are frozen.
overview.unavailable: This assessment could not be opened.
overview.completedMessage: This assessment is saved and frozen. You can review sections, but answers cannot be changed.
overview.followUpAccessibilityLabel: Start a follow-up assessment with stable details pre-filled
overview.confirmMessage: This will save and freeze this assessment; you won't be able to change answers.
overview.confirmMessageWithUnansweredOne: 1 question is unanswered. This will save and freeze this assessment; you won't be able to change answers.
overview.confirmMessageWithUnansweredOther: %{count} questions are unanswered. This will save and freeze this assessment; you won't be able to change answers.

results.title: A welfare overview
results.unavailable: The welfare overview is available after an assessment has been completed.
results.disclaimer: This is a general overview of the answers in this completed assessment. It is not a diagnosis, and it does not prescribe treatment or husbandry changes. Every parrot is an individual, so review concerns with a qualified professional before deciding what to change.

consult.title: Review this with a professional
consult.description: Use the indicators below as topics for professional guidance.

urgent.title: Please review with a professional soon
urgent.description: These answered indicators carry a professional-review marker. They are items to discuss, not diagnoses.

attention.title: Areas that could be improved
attention.description: These answered indicators landed toward the compromised-welfare end of their individual scale.
attention.empty: No answered indicators are listed in this area.

observe.title: 🔍 Learn more and observe
observe.description: These answers point to topics to observe more closely or interpret in context.

reviewed.title: Sections reviewed
reviewed.description: The overview was built across the assessment sections below.
reviewed.empty: No sections had answered questions in this assessment.

results.monthlyNote: You can repeat the assessment monthly to monitor changes over time.

trends.title: How these indicators changed
trends.unavailable: Change over time is available after an assessment has been completed.
trends.description: Each row follows one indicator that was highlighted in at least one completed assessment for this parrot. Indicators are never combined.
trends.consultDescription: Use changes in individual indicators as topics for professional guidance.
trends.emptyTitle: Come back after another completed assessment
trends.emptyDescription: Change over time needs at least two completed assessments for the same parrot. Repeat the assessment next month to compare individual indicators.

report.title: Welfare overview report
report.consultDescription: Use the indicators in this report as topics for professional guidance.
report.unavailable: Report sharing is not available on this device.
report.error: The report could not be shared. Please try again.

assessment.imageReferenceCaption: Reference illustration in the printed guide.
assessment.imageReferenceAccessibility: Reference illustration placeholder. No photo is embedded.

legend.title: How to interpret your answers
legend.handGoodDirection: ↑ likelihood to build an appropriate positive relationship
legend.handRiskDirection: ↑ risk for inappropriate or problematic relationship
legend.gradientAccessibility: Five-level welfare gradient from optimal to high risk.
legend.orderingNote: Answer options with icons are always ordered from most optimal to least desired, top to bottom.

dont_know.accessibilityLabel: Observe: learn more and observe your bird
dont_know.definition: Learn more and observe your bird.

context_dependent.definition: Interpret this answer in context with your parrot's needs.

what.title: What this is
what.body: A free, offline help tool that digitises the peer-reviewed PsittaWel companion-parrot welfare assessment. It is a companion to the instrument, not a replacement for professional advice.

instrument.title: The instrument & its authors
instrument.developedBy: Developed by Andrea Piseddu, Yvonne R. A. van Zeeland and Jean-Loup Rault, in collaboration with Ann Brooks, Pamela Clark, Sara Mainardi, Hildegard Niemann, Joanne Paul-Murphy and Valarie Tynes.

permission.title: Used with permission
permission.releaseGate: The instrument content is used with permission. Public release is gated on the authors' approval.

imagery.title: Imagery
imagery.body: Instrument photographs and illustrations are © their credited owners and are shown only from a local, non-distributed development asset directory. A fresh install shows placeholders.

app.title: This app
app.body: Built by KarmaNova Animal Technologies. The application code is open source (MIT/Apache-2.0).
app.notMonetised: Not monetised: no ads, subscriptions, or data sale.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Everything stays on this device. Your answers are stored only in local on-device storage: no account, no sign-in, no analytics, no ads, no tracking, nothing is sent anywhere.
